reason: The remediation only edits rsyslog configuration files to enable TLS for remote log forwarding. This is a straightforward text substitution and does not modify authentication mechanisms or critical system services. Restarting rsyslog is safe and will not lock out SSH or console access.
estimated_impact: networking affected; filesystems affected; Potential disruption of remote logging if rsyslog fails to restart; Misconfiguration could cause loss of audit logs
